rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no textual overlap with §11.181, which governs exemptions for charitable organizations building low-income housing. The sections address distinct exemption categories and do not reference each other.
quote: Sec. 11.181. CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS IMPROVING PROPERTY FOR LOW-INCOME HOUSING.
_note: No conflict identified; §11.181 addresses a separate exemption category unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b).
